title: Armor Trim Z-fighting Fix
description: Fixes the z-fighting on the edges of armor trim items
body:
In vanilla, Trimmed armor items z-fight on the edges of the item. 

With this pack, that should no longer be an issue!

Here is what it looks like in vanilla

![before and after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef7038aa07363cefe9c31c6c189e8acf21e9d767.png)
